We use cookies to improve HubSpot’s site. Some cookies are necessary for our website and services to function properly. Other cookies are optional and help personalize your experience, including advertising and analytics. You can consent to all cookies, decline all optional cookies, or manage optional cookies. Without a selection, our default cookie settings will apply. You can change your preferences at any time. To learn more, check out our
Cookie Policy
.

HubSpot Agentic Customer Platform
AI knows a lot about the world.
You need a platform that knows your world
The more you know about your customers, the better every interaction gets. With HubSpot, your teams and AI work from the same customer data.
Marketing is more personal, sales outreach is more insightful, and service issues are resolved faster.

HubSpot’s Smart CRM is the single source of truth that connects all your business data.
Products that connect to everything.

Disconnected tools and data slow you down. HubSpot connects everything — and everyone — in one place to make growing a business easier than you think.

We use cookies to improve HubSpot’s site. Some cookies are necessary for our website and services to function properly. Other cookies are optional and help personalize your experience, including advertising and analytics. You can consent to all cookies, decline all optional cookies, or manage optional cookies. Without a selection, our default cookie settings will apply. You can change your preferences at any time. To learn more, check out our
Cookie Policy

Marketing
Generate leads
Convert visitors into contacts for your database.
Automate marketing

Sales

Close deals

Startups & Small Businesses
Find and reach customers

Grow sales and get paid

analysis.name: HubSpot Service Hub
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered customer service platform that scales support and drives customer retention on a unified CRM.
analysis.ideal_customer: Growing businesses wanting to unify customer support with CRM data and scale with AI agents without sacrificing ease of use

features.name: help desk
features.description: Centralized ticketing and support desk for managing customer issues at scale
features.evidence_quote: Support customers at scale with AI and a help desk.

features.name: ai customer agent
features.description: Autonomous AI agent that resolves customer queries 24/7 without human intervention
features.evidence_quote: Resolve customer queries 24/7 - Scale customer service with an AI customer agent.

features.name: customer health monitoring
features.description: Tooling to identify retention risk and improvement opportunities across the customer base
features.evidence_quote: Drive retention - Identify opportunities to improve customer health.

features.name: knowledge base
features.description: Self-service knowledge base enabling customers to find answers without contacting support
features.evidence_quote: Service Hub - Learn about Service Hub and share your expertise.

features.name: breeze ai
features.description: Suite of AI agents and features powering automation and intelligence across the platform
features.evidence_quote: Breeze - AI agents and features that power the entire platform

features.name: native crm integration
features.description: Built-in integration with HubSpot Smart CRM for unified customer data across service, sales, and marketing
features.evidence_quote: All of HubSpot's marketing, sales, and customer service software on one agentic platform.

features.name: support automation
features.description: Automation workflows to handle repetitive support tasks and route tickets
features.evidence_quote: Scale support - Support customers at scale with AI and a help desk.

features.name: aeo tooling
features.description: Answer engine optimization tools to track and improve brand visibility in AI-powered search results
features.evidence_quote: AEO (Beta) - Answer engine optimization tools that track and improve your brand's visibility in AI results

features.name: marketplace integrations
features.description: App marketplace connecting Service Hub to third-party tools via HubSpot Marketplace
features.evidence_quote: HubSpot Marketplace - Connect your favorite apps to HubSpot

features.name: onboarding and training services
features.description: Professional onboarding, customer training, migration, and strategic consulting services
features.evidence_quote: Services - Onboarding, Customer Training, Migration, Strategic Consulting, Technical Consulting

features.name: developer api and docs
features.description: API and CMS developer documentation for building custom integrations and extensions
features.evidence_quote: Developer Documentation - Reference for API & CMS development

features.name: multi-language support
features.description: Platform and knowledge base available in multiple languages including Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Portuguese
features.evidence_quote: Select a language: Español, Deutsch, 日本語, Português, Français, Nederlands, Italiano, Polski...

features.name: free crm
features.description: Free HubSpot CRM included as the foundational layer for all hubs including Service Hub
features.evidence_quote: Free HubSpot CRM - Overview of all products

features.name: customer data unification
features.description: Unified customer data platform connecting service, sales, and marketing data in one place
features.evidence_quote: Organize customer data - Unify your team and data on one platform.

features.name: small business bundle
features.description: Starter edition bundle packaging all hubs for startups and small businesses at a lower price point
features.evidence_quote: Small Business Bundle - The Starter edition of each product, built for startups and small businesses

differentiators: All-in-one agentic customer platform unifying marketing, sales, and service on a single CRM
37% improvement in ticket closure rates cited after one year on platform
AI customer agent enabling 24/7 autonomous query resolution without human agents
AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) tooling for AI search visibility — claimed beta differentiation
No sacrifice of power for ease of use at enterprise scale

free_tier.limits: Free HubSpot CRM included; Service Hub free tier seat/feature caps not specified in sources

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: Entry-level service tools; part of Small Business Bundle for startups and SMBs

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.headline_inclusions: Premium service features including automation and advanced help desk tools

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Full enterprise feature set with advanced permissions and scale

pricing.notes: Pricing page source was truncated before tier prices rendered; all price_per_seat values are null due to missing source data. Free and premium plans confirmed to exist. Small Business Bundle packages Starter tier of all hubs together.
